import sys
import ast

# 读取并解析 stock_analysis_service.py
with open\(''app/services/stock_analysis_service.py'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    code = f.read\(\)

# 尝试解析 AST
tree = ast.parse\(code\)
print\(''stock_analysis_service.py: Syntax OK''\)

# 读取并解析 ai.py
with open\(''app/api/ai.py'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    code = f.read\(\)

tree = ast.parse\(code\)
print\(''ai.py: Syntax OK''\)

# 读取并解析测试文件
with open\(''test_hkstock_market_analysis.py'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    code = f.read\(\)

tree = ast.parse\(code\)
print\(''test_hkstock_market_analysis.py: Syntax OK''\)

print\(\)
print\(''All files syntax check passed!''\)
")
